title: DAY TREATMENT FOR CHILDREN AND YOUTH - 211info
text: LIFEWORKS NW ST JOHNS DAY TREATMENT FOR CHILDREN AND YOUTH Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF The Nickerson Adolescent Day Treatment Program provides mental health treatment and academic services. 8425 N Lombard Street Portland, OR 97203 Eligibility: Ages 11-18 who are experiencing serious psychiatric difficulties Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm Email (503) 645-9010 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (503) 645-9010 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Must be referred. Participation requires school district authorization and referral by Coordinated Care Organization or Kaiser Permanente. FEES: Varies by program. Nearly all LifeWorks Northwest programs accept OHP/Medicaid and Medicare. Some programs serve uninsured individuals or offer free or discounted services. DOCUMENTS: Insurance information, if applicable AREA SERVED: Multnomah County TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: TriMet bus lines 4, 17, and 75 Services: Psychiatric Day Treatment * Adolescents Psychiatric Day Treatment * Children Other Services Offered At This Location: INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - ACTIVE PARENTING INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - CHILDREN'S RELIEF NURSERY INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - PARENT EDUCATION AND SUPPORT MENTAL HEALTH ASSESSMENT AND TREATMENT - OUTPATIENT MENTAL HEALTH CARE MENTAL HEALTH ASSESSMENT AND TREATMENT - PARENT-CHILD INTERACTIVE THERAPY MENTAL HEALTH ASSESSMENT AND TREATMENT - TRANSITION-AGE YOUTH SERVICES SUBSTANCE USE DISORDER SERVICES - YOUTH SUBSTANCE USE DISORDER TREATMENT If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. LIFEWORKS NW ST JOHNS
